title: Factory Town
description: Rebuild your family factory and restore the town into a thriving community by setting up supply lines and unlocking new technology...
body:
# ⚠️ Beta Warning

This Modpack is still in **Beta**. We plan on making a custom map and a full quest storyline to lead you through the different technologies. That will be Version 1.0.0. This pack is still in development. (Also, cobblemon will most likely not be in the final version, as it does not quite fit the theme. We are just including it to have fun while we work on the quests and map.)

![Factory Town Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/123e6ba1bea5b59e8bfe48a5a3ddaf7239910265_0.webp)


# Factory Town
— A City-Building Adventure Modpack (1.20.1)

**Arrive. Rebuild. Supply. Thrive.**
You inherit a crumbling factory on the edge of a dying settlement called Factory Town. Most residents have fled. A lone copper golem—chatty, helpful, maybe a little quirky—nudges you forward with quests and tips. Your job? Turn rust into industry and a ghost town into a living city.

The world beyond your fence line isn’t kind: smog, poison rain, failing farms, and stalled trade routes choke every frontier. If Factory Town is to survive, you’ll need to restore neighbouring regions and stitch them together with rail, logistics, and crafty engineering—then watch as the town expands, shops reopen, and streets fill with life.

**What is this pack about?**

**Rebuild the Factory:** Repair machines, bootstrap power, and stand up proper production lines. Your factory’s growth unlocks new systems and story beats.

**Quest-Driven Progression:** A guided, open-ended path where the copper golem delivers objectives, advice, and world flavour—no hand-holding, just a steady nudge.

**Region-Based Challenges:**

**Farming Kingdom:** Crops won't grow, and food keeps spoiling. So help this kingdom withering under a drought; help them to recover, and in return, secure food for Factory Town.

**Oil Bay:** Untangle a stalled fuel economy and bring energy back online.

**Dwarven Mines:** Reopen ore supply and restore heavy industry.
Each success feeds a supply chain that boosts Factory Town’s population, output, and skyline.

**City Building Loop:** Establish railroads and depots, automate deliveries, and scale from a sputtering workshop to a thriving urban hub.

**Atmospheric Survival:** Plan around bad air and hostile weather. The environment pushes back until you push harder with infrastructure.

**Green Thumb:** Be friends with nature and with the power of green technology, fight back against the smog.



![Factory Town Boat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a09962340befd33cfafc9ccb978066bc6b635bf9_0.webp)

# Pre-loaded:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

The link below is for a version of the Modpack that has a **pre-generated** singleplayer world with a **20,000 x 20,000** block world border. This is so you will be able to jump right into the fun with as little lag from generating chunks as possible. It also includes a fully generated **'Xaero's World Map.'** It is a big file, but worth it, so you can enjoy the mods without waiting for chunks and maps to load first.

[https://mega.nz/file/3lQACA4L#ReT6N3pywj28I3RSMIJr-4zanmjkOobG_3ZEZTzOlHI](https://mega.nz/file/3lQACA4L#ReT6N3pywj28I3RSMIJr-4zanmjkOobG_3ZEZTzOlHI)

</details>
